text.title: Consumer Contract Tests Generated from OpenAPI / Traffic Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf references a rule id (including `skip-this-methodology`).

decision-tree.root-question: Does a canonical artifact (OpenAPI / proto / traffic / typed client) exist for the API under contract?

conclusion.verdict: no source to generate from — write OpenAPI first
reject: broker check not gating merges
reject: manual edit of generated artifact

text.example: OpenAPI@abc1234 → generator emits pacts/consumer-acme-web.json + tests/pact/test_acme_web.py → broker accepts → can-i-deploy green → merge.
